thread.title: Prince Harry finally steps out of conflict with the royal family
thread.title_full: Prince Harry finally steps out of conflict with the royal family

author: archyworldyscom
title: Prince Harry finally steps out of conflict with the royal family
text:
loading…
Prince Harry has reportedly walked away from his ongoing conflict with the royal family after making the decision not to promote his memoir . Photos/people
ENGLISH – Prince Harry He has reportedly moved on from his ongoing conflict with the royal family after making the decision not to promote his memoir, Spare, which was recently released in paperback. The Duke of Sussex is gone Royal family since 2020, when he stepped down as a senior royal and moved to the United States. Since then, Prince Harry’s relationship with his family has worsened following a series of shocking claims made in interviews, on a Netflix show with wife Meghan Markle and in his memoir.
According to Express, Friday (22/11/2024), Spare was published in January 2023 and became an international bestseller after selling 1.4 million copies on its first day in the UK, US and Canada, according to the its publisher, Penguin Random House.
However, the paperback edition released on 24 October 2024 was not as successful after selling just 1,809 copies in the UK in its first week of release and a further 3,391 copies the following week. The new edition contains no new material and Harry has not promoted it.
Photos/People
Now royal expert Jennie Bond has praised the Duke for his stance and said it could be his way out of conflict with the royal family.
“I don’t think he’ll be too upset about it. He made a lot of money from the initial contract and, whatever he says, he’s already a very rich man,” Bond said.
The expert said the 40-year-old prince’s decision to publish the memoirs was more because the duke wanted to tell his story, rather than to increase his income.
#Prince #Harry #finally #steps #conflict #royal #family
